meta.title: Core Control Unit | Engineering & Digital Solutions
meta.description: Core Control Unit is a French software engineering company specialising in system architecture and custom digital solutions.

hero.taglineSub: We build the websites and apps your business runs on, and put your brand on billboards across all 50 US states.

services.heading: Services
services.subtitle: From websites and custom apps to billboard campaigns across all 50 US states. We build it, launch it, and get your brand noticed.

items.title: Websites & Web Apps
items.description: Websites and web apps for people and businesses. We hand over all the code, or take care of hosting for you, whichever suits you best.

items.title: Billboard Advertising
items.description: Physical advertising across all 50 US states through our partner network of 3,200 billboards. Nationwide reach, the right locations, hard to miss.

items.title: Bots & Custom Apps
items.description: Discord and Telegram bots, plus custom desktop software built around the way you work. If it can be built, we'll build it.

items.title: Smart Contract Audit
items.description: A thorough security review of your blockchain smart contracts, with a clear report of anything that needs fixing.

items.title: Smart Contract Development
items.description: Custom blockchain smart contracts, tokens, NFTs & more, built securely from the ground up.

items.title: Web3 Integration
items.description: Connect your website or app to the blockchain, from wallet sign-in to live on-chain data, smoothly integrated.

about.heading: About
about.p1: Core Control Unit is a digital studio covering websites, custom software, and billboard advertising across all 50 US states through a 3,200-strong partner network, with blockchain know-how on hand whenever a project calls for it.
about.p2: We work directly with individuals, startups, and small businesses. No middlemen, no bloat, just clear communication, quick turnaround, and work you fully own.
about.p3: We work remotely with clients around the world and handle each project end to end: from the first line of code to the billboard going live.

values.label: Reliability
values.desc: Built to last, not just to demo.

contact.heading: Start a project
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We reply within 48 hours.
contact.placeholderProject: Describe your project, your current stack, your constraints...

projects.heading: Recent projects
projects.detailSubtitle: A closer look at what we're building, end to end.

items.title: Seculars Online
items.description: A massively-multiplayer online real-time strategy game in active development. Found a village in an endless, procedurally generated world, build & defend it, and play alongside others. Publicly testable right now.
items.longDescription: Seculars Online is our in-house MMO real-time strategy game (Build 10, in active development), running entirely in the browser on a custom WebGPU engine built with three.js & drei. Villages come from infinite procedural generation, so the world never ends. Trees, grass and buildings are instanced matrix entities animated with a vertex animation texture (VAT) technique for smooth, GPU-cheap motion, right down to buildings clipping into place as they are constructed. On the roadmap: a full world map, battles, castle defense, deeper city building, player-owned guilds, and more. It is already open for public testing, so jump in, explore, and help shape where it goes.
